title: Monday-sdk-js sessionToken documentation still has "app secret" listed instead of "client secret"
excerpt:
Related post from 2020 
The documentation for sessionToken from monday-sdk-js states that the sessionToken is signed with your app secret when it is actually signed with client secret

posts.author: Grant (Grant)
posts.cookedHtml:
Related post from 2020

The documentation for sessionToken from monday-sdk-js states that the sessionToken is signed with your app secret when it is actually signed with client secret

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Grant,

It should be updated now. Thanks for letting us know!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Grant!

Thank you for that feedback. I will send this to the team in charge of the documentation

Cheers,
Matias
